overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rustic lakeside settlement with thatched-roof huts and wooden docks, eventually wading into the clear mountain lake while villagers work nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural fishing settlement with thatched huts

events.description: passing by villagers working with lumber piles on the left
approaching wooden dock structures by the lake shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the settlement toward the waterfront, passing wooden carts and lumber works

notable_agents.action: villager hammering on wooden lumber pile
villager working near thatched hut entrance

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with straw thatched roof and open sides
large wooden wagon with spoked wheels parked on grass
piles of cut wooden planks and logs stacked for construction
rustic wooden pier with thatched roof shelters extending over water

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit rural settlement with dirt paths and moderate vegetation. Thatched-roof fishing huts and wooden carts dot the landscape while villagers work with lumber piles. The camera approaches wooden dock structures extending toward the lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock with thatched roof shelters

events.description: stepping onto wooden dock platform over the lake water
turning to survey the dock area while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the weathered wooden docks, passing under thatched roof shelters and examining the fishing area

notable_agents.action: villager bending over working on fishing nets or crates

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway over water
wooden barrels and crates used for fish storage
tall wooden A-frame structure with pulley mechanism on shore

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wooden dock area with thatched roof shelters providing partial shade. Geralt walks on weathered planks over clear lake water, passing wooden barrels and fishing equipment. A large wooden crane structure is visible on the distant shore while villagers work nearby.

events.description: leaving wooden dock and stepping onto gravel shoreline
walking from gravel shore into shallow lake water

agents.ego_description: Geralt transitioning from docks to the gravel shore and wading into the lake water

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking along the shore path

entered.detail: pebble and gravel beach along the water's edge
wooden rowboats pulled up on the gravel shore
distant mountain range visible across the lake

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the wooden docks and walks along a gravel shoreline where rowboats are beached. The camera passes a woman walking the opposite direction before Geralt steps into the shallow lake water. Distant mountains become visible across the clear water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow mountain lake water near shore

events.description: stopping forward motion and turning to face back toward the settlement
water ripples and reflections visible as character stands in the lake

agents.ego_description: Geralt standing in shallow water, looking back at the settlement and surrounding mountain scenery

entered.detail: distant view of the fishing village from the water

segments.scene_description: Standing in the clear shallow water with no other people around, Geralt turns to observe the settlement from the lake. The water surface creates ripples and reflections while the thatched huts and wooden structures of the village are visible on the distant shore against the mountain backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the heart of a rustic lakeside settlement out into the clear, shallow waters of a mountain lake. It begins with Geralt walking along sunlit dirt paths past thatched-roof fishing huts and villagers working with lumber, moving steadily toward the water's edge. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows him onto weathered wooden docks and under shaded shelters, passing barrels and fishing gear while a large crane looms on the distant shore. The scene then opens up as Geralt leaves the planks for a gravel shoreline dotted with beached rowboats, passing a villager before stepping directly into the cool, transparent water. Finally, the camera pivots as Geralt stands in the rippling shallows, turning back to observe the distant village and its wooden structures set against a backdrop of towering mountains.
